meaning: n.市场上买的礼物,酬谢礼品
examples: Waving the gusset, fairing the cloud of yesterday.
In fact, China has mature experience in fairing design.
Forward right wing to body fairing has several loose screws.
In that time sales have plummeted by 25% for the year with stock prices fairing much worse.
All the major events such as rocket-stage separation, fairing separation, and the ejection of the dummy payload occurred on cue.
